title: acidanthera euryphylla
intro: Acidanthera euryphylla, also known as the 'Himalayan Lily' or 'Lilyturf', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Iridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acidanthera euryphylla are said to include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing, as well as being used to treat various skin conditions. Acidanthera euryphylla is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in the form of a paste or ointment for topical application.
